---
title: No skip link without bootstrap
toc: true
format:
  html:
    theme: none
_quarto:
  tests:
    html:
      ensureHtmlElements:
        - []
        -
          # the skip link is only injected for bootstrap-themed output
          - 'a#quarto-skip-link'
---

The skip-to-content link is injected by the bootstrap HTML postprocessor,
so `theme: none` output should not contain it (there is also no theme CSS
to style it) (<https://github.com/quarto-dev/quarto-cli/issues/14684>).

## Section One

Text.
